TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang B'anux ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 423 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 407 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 16 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 92%, Amis 1%, Rukay 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na B'anux hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na B'anux ya hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na B'anux hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na B'anux hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na B'anux hya' ga Maytayax. tay 'zil na B'anux ya hya' ga Maylubung. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pkba'an biru nku Maylubung ga hi kwara, twangan mkbaga biru lla'i ttekuy lga, kwara la. kocyo naha ga Tayan kahun Nanto. Sayun lalu nya tayan. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βʔanux ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, rukaj *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βʔanux ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na βʔanux ja ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βʔanux ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βʔanux ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βʔanux ħjaʔ ɣa majtajax. taj ʔzil na βʔanux ja ħjaʔ ɣa majluβuŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pkβaʔan βiru nku majluβuŋ ɣa ħi kwara, twaŋan mkβaɣa βiru llaʔi ttekuj lɣa, kwara la. koʦ~ʨjo naħa ɣa tajan kaħun nanto. s~ɕajun lalu nja tajan. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang B'anux ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Tayang go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 119 buwan, 423 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 407 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 16 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 92%, Amis 1%, Rukay 1%, Setik 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na B'anux hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na B'anux ya hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na B'anux hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na B'anux hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na B'anux hya' ga Maytayax. tay 'zil na B'anux ya hya' ga Maylubung. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pkba'an biru nku Maylubung ga hi kwara, twangan mkbaga biru lla'i ttekuy lga, kwara la. kocyo naha ga Tayan kahun Nanto. Sayun lalu nya tayan. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βʔanux ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu tajaŋ ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, rukaj *%, s~ɕetik *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βʔanux ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na βʔanux ja ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βʔanux ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na βʔanux ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βʔanux ħjaʔ ɣa majtajax. taj ʔzil na βʔanux ja ħjaʔ ɣa majluβuŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pkβaʔan βiru nku majluβuŋ ɣa ħi kwara, twaŋan mkβaɣa βiru llaʔi ttekuj lɣa, kwara la. koʦ~ʨjo naħa ɣa tajan kaħun nanto. s~ɕajun lalu nja tajan. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
